<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band10_chunk005.pdf#page=2 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band10 p202 -->

<!-- header: NEUBURG -->

<!-- header: NEUBUR -->


[[File:Band10_chunk005_p002_img001.jpg|thumb|W<sub>6</sub> Der hl. Franz Xaver als Fürbitter vor Maria]]



[[File:Band10_chunk005_p002_img002.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band10 p203 -->
